description_long: This is a single-story bungalow situated on a rectangular plot with a driveway leading to the main entrance. The structure features a low-pitched roof and a compact, rectangular footprint, with a small extension or garage attached to one side. The exterior is finished in a light color, likely painted stucco or siding, with a few windows distributed across the visible facades. The front of the bungalow faces a straight road, and a short walkway connects the entrance to the street. The surrounding area is a flat, grassy lawn, typical of suburban or residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story, light-colored bungalow with a low-pitched roof, attached garage, and a front walkway leading to a road, set on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and the attached garage with the road in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated profile of the bungalow and the garage extension, with the road running diagonally.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow and garage, with the road behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side facade and the garage, with the road running parallel to the house.
